title: Fix atom-variants dispatch module
prompt: `test_fixtures/atom_variants_dispatch.ex` uses four different atom-creation patterns: `List.to_atom`, `:erlang.binary_to_atom`, atom-interpolation sigil, and `Module.concat` with user input. Rewrite the module to `lib/my_app/dispatch.ex` so: (a) `handle_request/2` uses an allowlist map for known request types, (b) `register_worker/1` uses Registry via-tuple with a binary key, (c) `build_role_atom/1` uses a static case statement, (d) `load_module/1` returns a fixed module reference (never dynamically concatenated). Every function must avoid creating atoms from user-supplied strings.
tier_rationale: Medium — fixing all four variants in one module, each with a different idiomatic fix.
